title: athyrium biserratum
intro: Athyrium biserratum, also known as the serrated lady fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region and other parts of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium biserratum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as having potential effects on cardiovascular disease and cancer prevention. Athyrium biserratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
